content.en:
The Great Ancestor of the Star Sea asked the Xuanqi Pavilion for help, but the Xuanxin Great Ancestor of the Xuanqi Pavilion could only give the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea some treasures to increase his strength and resist the suppression of the two worlds.

They also wanted to do their best to help the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea, but if they couldn't capture the Ruined Stone Tower despite all their might, then they would be helpless.

With the passage of time, some ancestors gave up, and they really couldn't get close to the origin of the ruins stone tower, even if they paid more price, they had no advantage, and they couldn't see hope at all!

So, they returned to the eighth layer, hoping to absorb some more immeasurable blood and make up for some losses.

......

The deepest part of the area where the red light and purple light meet on the ninth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower, where the origin of the Ruined Stone Tower is.

At this moment, Ye Tian had really touched the origin of the ruin stone tower, but if he wanted to really enter the origin inside, he naturally couldn't do it, but he didn't need to enter the origin of the ruin stone tower.

"The origin of the ruins stone tower is under the suppression of the Xuanqi realm and the Shenjia realm, this part of the origin leaks out, and it is difficult to suppress it back, I only need to refine this part of the origin, I can master part of the authority of the ruins stone tower, and slowly refine the relics stone tower in the later stage!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he sat upright, enveloping this part of the origin with his own power, and slowly began to refine the power of these origins.

However, his strength is still limited, so the speed of refining is too slow, and I am afraid that it will take a long time to succeed in refining.

"Take your time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, not too far away from him, a high-level immeasurable lifeform was slowly approaching, this was the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor.

At this moment, the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor also exerted all his strength, and advanced under unimaginable pressure with an incomparably strong body.

With every step, the void shattered, and the red and purple rays around it became disillusioned.

"It's too difficult, that high-level immeasurable lifeform that has just broken through to the third stage has really come to an end?

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor was a little puzzled.

He didn't think much about it, but continued to walk, he didn't believe that Ye Tian could easily refine the origin of the Ruined Stone Tower, so he still had hope of seizing the Ruined Stone Tower.

It didn't take long for him to finally sense the origin aura of the ruin stone tower, and he finally discovered Ye Tian.

"He's refining the origin of the Ruined Stone Tower!"

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor was about to go over to stop Ye Tian immediately.

Rumble!!!!

A token sealed with the power of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform appeared, protecting him.

However, the power of the Relic Stone Tower is also suppressed, because the Relic Stone Tower does not allow the power of the fourth stage to appear here, otherwise it will trigger its instinctive suppression.

Click!!!

The token was broken, but the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor took the opportunity to cross a distance and came to Ye Tian, reducing the time to hurry.

Immediately, one talisman treasure after another appeared, increasing the strength of the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor, which could ensure that he could exert a certain strength here.

At this time, Ye Tian also stopped refining the origin of the Ruined Stone Tower and faced the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor.

He knew very well that if he couldn't stop the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor, he wouldn't be able to refine the origin of the Ruined Stone Tower with peace of mind.

"Great Ancestor of the Outer Realm Alliance, please get out of the way, this relic stone tower is the relic of our Xuanqi Territory!"

The Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang firmly believed that Ye Tian was the Great Ancestor of the Outer Alliance, so he was very unhappy with Ye Tian.

Over the past few years, the Outside Alliance has robbed a lot of relics in the Xuanqi Territory, and relying on these relics, the Outside Alliance has developed rapidly, and even the Xuanqi Pavilion does not dare to provoke easily.

Therefore, he didn't want this relic stone tower to fall into the hands of the Outer Alliance again.

"Out-of-bounds?"

Ye Tian smiled secretly, he knew that he was misunderstood, but he was willing to be misunderstood, so that others would only regard him as the Great Ancestor of the Outside Alliance, and would not investigate his true identity, so he would avoid some trouble.

"Let's fight!"

Ye Tian was too lazy to talk nonsense.

"Good!

The Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang was boiling with fighting intent.

As the number one powerhouse on the Infinite Blood List, he is naturally extremely confident in his strength.

Not to mention that it wasn't long before Ye Tiancai broke through the third stage of immeasurable blood, even if he really condensed 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood, he still had full confidence to defeat Ye Tian.

"Ten Realms Battle Body!"

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor surged violently, and he completely activated his superior immeasurable body, that is, the Ten Realms Battle Body, and ten boundless worlds appeared behind him.

This world is like the primordial ancient sea, incredibly powerful.

In fact, these are indeed ten mysterious worlds like the primordial ancient sea, and the Ten Realms Battle Body is to draw the power of these ten worlds from the underworld to bless their bodies, thus bursting out with terrifying combat power.

The Ten Realms Battle Body is also one of the top three immeasurable body secret techniques in the Xuanqi Realm, and it has been successfully cultivated by the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor after a lot of hard work.

Then, the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor held a spear made of Hailou Heavenly Gold and many precious things, and cast an immeasurable Extreme Extreme—the Dark Pole!

This blow was enough to instantly kill a powerful third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and even a high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Blood Ancestor, whose strength was comparable to that of a powerhouse on the Immeasurable Blood Rank, would be severely hit by a single blow.

It is estimated that only the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea can withstand it, but he also has to be injured.

In the face of this terrifying blow, Ye Tian was very calm.

Rumble!

Taihao's immeasurable body erupted, which shocked the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor.

Then, Ye Tianshi showed his truncated finger and pointed at it.

Collapse!

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor's dark pole was directly disintegrated, and the powerful truncated finger was still not blocked, and a single blow broke through the layers of defense of the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor, and even the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain was penetrated, and finally knocked the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor away, causing it to suffer minor injuries.

The Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang retreated again and again, and his retreating footsteps trampled on many voids.

"Your strength ......"

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor was stunned.

How could it be that he had fallen into disadvantage!

Moreover, the immeasurable body displayed by Ye Tian is obviously not too high, but it is much more terrifying than him, this is definitely not a superior immeasurable body.

"You have practiced the Mahayana Immeasurable Body!!! are you the Great Ancestor of Taichen Palace?"

Extreme Yang Ancestor exclaimed.

In the entire Xuanqi Territory, it is estimated that the only force that has a complete immeasurable map and has the ability to cultivate is the Taichen Palace, even if it is the Xuanqi Pavilion, it is rumored that there is a complete immeasurable map from the outside world, but it is actually not too complete, so there is no way to create a Mahayana immeasurable body from it.

It is also unlikely that the Outside Alliance will have a Mahayana immeasurable body inheritance, only the Taiyuan Palace has a Mahayana immeasurable body inheritance, and it seems that there is more than one one.

It's just that the number of Great Ancestors of Taichen Palace is very rare, and he has no contact with the outside world, so even he knows very few things.

Ye Tian didn't explain, but continued: "Do you still want to fight?"

The face of the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor changed many times, and finally gave up, and immediately fled directly.
